response.justification: Bogdan is a talented polyglot engineer with strong software craftsmanship principles, but he is fundamentally misaligned with this role's core requirements. He has only ~6 months of professional C++ experience (National Instruments, 2014-2015) versus the mandatory 5-10 years required. His entire career trajectory—web platforms, GIS systems, and open-source projects—has bypassed Windows-based systems programming and financial services entirely. While he demonstrates communication excellence and some SQL/Java knowledge, these cannot compensate for the absence of the primary technical skill and domain expertise this role demands.
strengths: Excellent software craftsmanship fundamentals (TDD, CI/CD, code quality) and demonstrated communication skills through workshops and open-source contributions
Some SQL and Java experience that could provide partial foundation for enterprise systems work
Strong track record of learning new technologies and mastering diverse technical domains
concerns: Only ~6 months of professional C++ experience versus 5-10 years mandatory requirement—represents ~90% shortfall on the primary technical qualification
No Windows platform development experience; entire recent career centered on web (Node.js, TypeScript) and Linux-based systems
Complete absence of financial services domain knowledge (fixed income, capital markets, investment banking, trading systems)
